test_credentials_note: These are test-only defaults for E2E testing, not production credentials

graphql_operations.login: mutation Login($username: String!, $password: String!) { login(username: $username, password: $password) { token user { username } } }
graphql_operations.get_jobs: query GetJobs { jobs { id status progress filesTotal filesCompleted createdAt completedAt } }
graphql_operations.get_job: query GetJob($id: String!) { job(id: $id) { id status progress filesTotal filesCompleted filesProcessing { filename progress cellsTotal cellsTranslated } filesFailed { filename error } completedFiles { originalFilename outputFilename cellsTranslated } createdAt completedAt } }
graphql_operations.get_language_pairs: query GetLanguagePairs { languagePairs { id sourceLanguage targetLanguage sourceLanguageCode targetLanguageCode } }
graphql_operations.add_language_pair: mutation AddLanguagePair($sourceLanguage: String!, $targetLanguage: String!, $sourceLanguageCode: String!, $targetLanguageCode: String!) { addLanguagePair(sourceLanguage: $sourceLanguage, targetLanguage: $targetLanguage, sourceLanguageCode: $sourceLanguageCode, targetLanguageCode: $targetLanguageCode) { id sourceLanguage targetLanguage } }
graphql_operations.create_translation_job: mutation CreateTranslationJob($fileIds: [String!]!, $languagePairId: String!) { createTranslationJob(fileIds: $fileIds, languagePairId: $languagePairId) { id status progress filesTotal } }
graphql_operations.get_model_config: query GetModelConfig { modelConfig { modelId modelName availableModels { name id } } }
graphql_operations.update_model: mutation UpdateModel($modelId: String!) { updateModel(modelId: $modelId) { modelId modelName } }
